rulings.Case Title: RACHEL D. WAGNER ET AL VS. CAM H. LUU ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Aug. 03, 2020 line 1. DEFENDANTs CAM LUU, ANTHONY LUU, CAM PHAM, and CHRISTINE LUU's DEMURRER to COMPLAINT continued to September 3, 2020. Parties are ordered to comply with SFRL 2.7B and provide courtesy copies of their respective filings in support of and in opposition to this motion with cover letters reflecting the new hearing date. The Court is in possession of the Courtesy copy of the moving papers. = (501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: ASIAN INC. VS. MARGARET BAUER ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION / Notice Of Motion To Compel Discovery Responses And Production Of Documents, And Request For Monetary Sanctions Against Plaintiff; Memorandum Of Points & Authorities; Declaration Of Sarah Fenton Hinks
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Aug. 03, 2020 line 2. DEFENDANT SAUL FLORES's Motion To Compel Discovery Responses And Production Of Documents, And Request For Monetary Sanctions Against Plaintiff continued to August 10, 2020. Parties to engage in good faith meet and confer efforts and to submit a joint separate statement by August 6, 2020 addressing the outstanding issues. The Court notes that it is not clear to the Court whether responses referenced in Mr. Goldman's declaration have been considered by the defendant prior to the filing of this motion, as contrary to the assertions in the declaration, there were no exhibits A through C attached to the declaration on file. = (501/CFH)
